Select.items: {path: 'employee>/ZSPORTS_REPRESENTATION', sorter: { path: 'SPORTS_REPRESENTATION_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZMOBILE_CATEGORY_PURPOSE', sorter: { path: 'MOBILE_CATEGORY_PURPOSE_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZVEHICLE_OWNERSHIP', sorter: { path: 'VEHICLE_OWNERSHIP_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZROOM_TYPE', sorter: { path: 'ROOM_TYPE_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZAREA', sorter: { path: 'AREA_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZVEHICLE_TYPE', sorter: { path: 'VEHICLE_TYPE_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZFARE_TYPE', sorter: { path: 'FARE_TYPE_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZVEHICLE_CLASS', sorter: { path: 'VEHICLE_CLASS_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZFLIGHT_CLASS', sorter: { path: 'FLIGHT_CLASS_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZLOC_TYPE', sorter: { path: 'LOC_TYPE_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZTRANSFER_MODE', sorter: { path: 'TRANSFER_MODE_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZREGION', sorter: { path: 'REGION_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
{path: 'employee>/ZMARITAL_CAT', sorter: { path: 'MARRIAGE_CATEGORY_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}
